overall.description: Static screen recording of Nicolas Poussin's classical painting 'Plague of Ashdod' displayed on a digital museum interface with informational text overlay describing the Peloponnesian War context and interactive UI buttons visible.

agents.ego_description: stationary viewing of the digital painting display and reading the informational text

entered.detail: large classical oil painting depicting biblical plague scene with figures in classical dress and architectural ruins
semi-transparent overlay with white text describing the Peloponnesian War context and historical background of the artwork
HIDE TEXT and LEARN MORE buttons at the bottom left of the screen interface

segments.scene_description: The video presents a static view of Nicolas Poussin's 'Plague of Ashdod' painting on a digital museum interface. The classical artwork occupies the center of the frame while informational text about the Peloponnesian War overlays the left side. Interactive buttons for hiding text or learning more are visible, and the scene remains completely unchanged throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, unchanging perspective of a digital museum interface showcasing a classical painting. It begins with a centered view of Nicolas Poussin's Plague of Ashdod, framed by the clean lines of a virtual gallery. As the camera remains fixed, the composition is layered with informational text regarding the Peloponnesian War on the left side of the screen. The scene persists in this static state, keeping the interactive UI buttons and the detailed artwork perfectly still throughout the entire sequence.
